text.title: Tech Debt Slot Quota Policy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have an active tech-debt register?

branch.question: Does the capacity model use slots (not hours)?

conclusion.verdict: author quota in slots with quarterly review

example.trace: input matches `register != empty` → sub-question → `slots_model == true` → conclusion ref=`quota-pinned-numeric`.
